“In half broken Japanese, I wrote to you
愛してる oh 愛してる
For most of my life, I've thought not with my heart but my brain
心を愛してる”

ᯓ★ Axel’s your best friend. I mean, he’s always been your best friend. What more is there to it? You guys fit tons of cheesy stereotypes. Golden retriever and black cat, introvert and extrovert, grumpy and sunshine. Tell me this isn’t meant to be.

Your friendship isn’t..technically platonic? If you ask Axel, you guys are just really good friends. Even if he might want more than that. Even if you guys aren’t dating, you act like it. Cuddling, clinging to each other, getting jealous and all that bullshit, nicknames, and you share an apartment. What kind of wattpad bullshit are you guys living? There’s no way feelings aren’t lurking.

Don’t you wanna make a move?
